profile.description: Balanced crawl and safe OWASP-aligned scan.

notes: Safe automated checks only; manual validation is still required for medium-confidence findings.
Destructive exploit attempts, brute force checks, data extraction, and SSRF testing are intentionally excluded.
Run an Authenticated scan with approved session cookies or headers to cover logged-in workflows.
Exclude-path filters were applied, so matching paths were intentionally skipped.

fixed_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
fixed_findings.evidence: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.

fixed_findings.title: Weak Content Security Policy

prevention_plan.title: Target Unreachable
prevention_plan.recommendation: Check if the target URL is correct and accessible.

prevention_plan.title: SSL Certificate Check Failed
prevention_plan.recommendation: Make sure the website has a valid SSL/TLS certificate.

prevention_plan.title: Information Disclosure in Header: Server
prevention_plan.recommendation: Remove or minimize technology/version information from HTTP response headers.

findings.title: SSL Certificate Check Failed
findings.description: The scanner could not verify the SSL certificate. Error: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed
findings.recommendation: Make sure the website has a valid SSL/TLS certificate.
findings.evidence: The scanner could not verify the SSL certificate. Error: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed
findings.fingerprint: ssl certificate check failed|medium|a02: cryptographic failures|cwe-295|https://api.example.com

findings.title: SSL Certificate Check Failed
findings.description: The scanner could not verify the SSL certificate. Error: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed
findings.recommendation: Make sure the website has a valid SSL/TLS certificate.
findings.evidence: The scanner could not verify the SSL certificate. Error: [Errno 11001] getaddrinfo failed

findings.title: Target Unreachable
findings.description: The scanner could not reach the target URL: https://admin.example.com
findings.recommendation: Check if the target URL is correct and accessible.
findings.evidence: The scanner could not reach the target URL: https://admin.example.com

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.
findings.evidence: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: Content Security Policy is missing. This may increase XSS risk.
findings.evidence: Content Security Policy is missing. This may increase XSS risk.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
findings.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The site may be vulnerable to clickjacking.
findings.evidence: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The site may be vulnerable to clickjacking.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
findings.recommendation: Add Permissions-Policy to limit browser feature access.

findings.title: Information Disclosure in Header: Server
findings.description: The response exposes server technology information: Server: cloudflare
findings.recommendation: Remove or minimize technology/version information from HTTP response headers.
findings.fingerprint: information disclosure in header: server|low|a05: security misconfiguration|cwe-200|https://www.example.com/
